privacyNotice: AccordMesh processes meeting audio to create transcripts and results. It may keep encrypted audio temporarily while processing and removes it after successful completion. When you use a configured provider, AccordMesh sends the audio or text needed for that task. Follow local law and workplace rules.
systemAudioUnavailable: System audio is unavailable or needs permission.
analyzeRequested: Analysis started. AccordMesh will process any speech still waiting in the queue.
noMicrophones: No usable microphone was found. Connect or enable a microphone, then refresh.
mockProviderAudioNote: MockProvider uses scripted meeting content. Microphone selection and the sound check still verify access to the local device.
stopConfirmBody: AccordMesh will stop capturing audio, process anything still waiting, and create the final meeting results.
completeRequiredFields: Complete the required fields and run the sound check before starting.
systemAudioRequiredBeforeStart: Allow system-audio capture before starting an online meeting.
systemAudioReadyDescription: AccordMesh will capture audio played by this Mac. Other app and system sounds may also be included.
systemAudioPermissionDescription: Allow Screen & System Audio Recording so AccordMesh can capture the remote side of an online meeting.
systemAudioRestartRequired: Permission was granted. Restart AccordMesh, then check again before starting.
mockSystemAudioBypass: MockProvider uses scripted remote audio, so system-audio permission is not needed for this test.
